creator: rscheff@freebsd.org
text:
Apparently my /usr/include got corrupted earlier today. And now every try to get buildworld in order fails....

It would be really good to have at least a cookbook how to manually create a working minimal /usr/include (the llvm-clang includes also overlap and don't get added in properly).

Copying from a slightly older version crossed some hurdles, but ultimately also fails...
